state_model.claim_boundary: This file preserves durable baselines, authority, declared capabilities, and promoted evidence. It intentionally does not store the current GitHub head, active branch, open pull requests, pull-request state, or current CI status.

last_substantive_baseline.title: Deploy demo backends and connect frontend API
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: PR #46 established the collector-independent demo-backend/API repository implementation and workflow on main. It did not establish current Azure inventory, scoped What-If, deployment, listener health, API health, frontend live rendering, report publication, or collector replacement.

latest_promoted_repository_event.title: Reconcile PR46 merge project state
latest_promoted_repository_event.claim_boundary: This is the latest repository event intentionally promoted into durable project memory. It is not a claim that the merge commit remains the current GitHub head.

work_ownership_resolution.rule: Before any write, resolve the live default-branch head, working branch, open pull requests, ownership, and exact-head CI. Pull-request descriptions carry branch-specific scope while open; merged project files must not claim that their own branch or pull request remains active.

repository_capabilities.claim_boundary: Repository presence proves versioned implementation only. Live GitHub confirms the exact current revision; Azure and service evidence determine deployment and operation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction after the read-only Azure planning boundary was stated
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant authorizes Azure reads and ProviderNoRbac planning for the existing-collector report-publication path only. It does not authorize the demo-backend/API workflow, deployment, collector changes, RBAC changes, report publication, guest commands, or any Azure mutation.

authority_defaults.rule: Authority is fail-closed unless a narrowly scoped bounded_authority_grant and current human instruction explicitly permit the operation.

deployment_state.claim_boundary: False means no qualifying evidence has been promoted into repository state. It does not replace a fresh Azure query before planning or action.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This evidence applies to the separate public-report publication architecture at its recorded time. It does not establish current demo-backend/API state or current Azure readiness.

live_state_resolution.repository: Query the live GitHub repository default branch and exact head at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query open pull requests, branch ownership, draft state, reviews, threads, and mergeability at read time.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh scoped Azure inventory, subscription and tenant context, cost, quota, policy, RBAC, ARM validation, What-If, deployment, guest, and service evidence.
